结节病.authors: Neyazi M, Venturini G, Brown KJ, Choi Y, Gorham JM, Layton OG, Verma A, Wang AJ, Gross RT, McDonough BA, Mendiola Pla M, Viveiros A, DeLaughter DM, DePalma SR, Kim Y, Reichart D, Wakimoto H, Elledge SJ, Divakaran S, Mitchell RN, Koh J, Park JB, Bowles DE, Glass C, Oudit GY, Seidman JG, Seidman CE
结节病.summary: 心脏肉瘤样病的不同组织区域存在显著差异的细胞组成和基因表达，并伴有B细胞克隆扩增及自身免疫反应。

结节病.title: How I do it: Calcium and vitamin D supplements in patients with sarcoidosis.
结节病.authors: Ungprasert P, Keller SF, Culver DA
结节病.summary: 结节病患者补钙和维生素D需权衡骨骼健康与高钙血症风险，需个体化监测。

ILD.title: Interstitial lung disease and the STING pathway.
ILD.authors: Velu PP, Zhu G, Mackenzie KJ
ILD.summary: STING通路异常在SAVI和COPA综合征的间质性肺病发病中起关键作用，但常见ILD中其作用尚不明确。

ILD.title: Osimertinib plus datopotamab deruxtecan in patients with EGFR-mutated advanced NSCLC after progression on first-line osimertinib: ORCHARD.
ILD.authors: Riess JW, Yu HA, Le X, de Langen AJ, Cho BC, Piotrowska Z, Hendriks LEL, Morabito A, Bonanno L, Brustugun OT, Halvorsen TO, Kim YJ, Marrone KA, Shiraishi Y, Goldman JW, Ambrose H, Smith PE, FraenkeI PG, Tang KH, Lehman JM, Goldberg SB
ILD.summary: 奥希替尼联合Dato-DXd在EGFR突变晚期NSCLC一线奥希替尼进展后显示43%客观缓解率，中位无进展生存期9.5-11.7个月。

ILD.title: Nintedanib combined with dual immunosuppression for interstitial lung disease in systemic sclerosis and rheumatoid arthritis: A systematic review and pooled multicentre real-world cohort study.
ILD.authors: Chioni A, Campochiaro C, Keret S, Panopoulos S, Baresic M, Varelas G, Radic M, Sebastiani M, Tektonidou MG, Sfikakis PP, Rimar D, Matucci-Cerinic M, Daoussis D
ILD.summary: 尼达尼布联合双免疫抑制剂治疗系统性硬化症和类风湿关节炎相关间质性肺病可稳定肺功能，尤其改善皮肤纤维化。

ILD.title: Integrated machine learning risk model for predicting radiation pneumonitis in lung cancer patients with interstitial lung disease.
ILD.authors: Lu H, Jiang A, Yuan Z, Chen D
ILD.summary: 该机器学习模型整合临床、剂量学和炎症指标，可准确预测肺癌合并间质性肺病患者的放射性肺炎风险。

ILD.title: Combined immunosuppressive therapy in systemic sclerosis-associated interstitial lung disease: Phenotypes matter.
ILD.authors: Marchetti M, Motta F, Tonutti A, Selmi C, De Santis M
ILD.summary: 系统性硬化症相关间质性肺病中，联合免疫抑制治疗应基于表型个性化选择。

ILD.title: Methodological considerations for quantitative computed tomography-based prognosis in fibrotic interstitial lung disease.
ILD.journal: Am J Respir Crit Care Med
ILD.authors: Hong Y, Shu Z
ILD.summary: 摘要缺失。

ILD.title: Izalontamab brengitecan (Iza-bren; BL-B01D1), a first-in-class EGFR-HER3 bispecific antibody-drug conjugate, for patients with EGFR-mutated NSCLC: pooled analysis of phase I and phase II trials.
ILD.authors: Hong SD, Wang YS, Zhao HY, Zhao YY, Wang QM, Ma YX, Li YS, Huang Y, Yang YP, Fu ZM, Chen LK, Zhou F, Yang J, Li XY, Hou X, Zhou NN, Sun LH, Zhang GF, Cui JW, Wu L, Chen G, Zhang YX, Wang HY, Lv DQ, Shi JH, Jiang B, Li C, Li XL, Tang KJ, Yu Y, Ji YH, He ZY, Zhu Y, Zhu H, Xiao S, Zhou CC, Zhang L, Fang WF
ILD.summary: EGFR突变NSCLC患者TKI耐药后使用双抗ADC药物Iza-bren效果显著，总缓解率达47.4%。

ILD.title: Rheumatoid arthritis-associated interstitial lung disease: screening, diagnosis, and treatment-an expert group consensus statement.
ILD.authors: Solomon JJ, Dieude P, Matson SM, Lee JS, Rojas-Serrano J, Sebastiani M, Gonzalez A, Demoruelle MK, Hoffman-Vold AM, Kam MLW, Swigris JJ, Sparks JA, Brown KK, Cottin V, Kellermeyer LM, Wilson KC, Waseda Y, Crestani B, Walsh SLF, Poletti V, Doyle T, Koduri G, Kelly C, Danoff S, Dellaripa PF
ILD.summary: RA-ILD专家共识提供了针对该病的筛查、诊断和治疗临床指导，以促进早期诊断和疾病管理。

ILD.title: Imaging Spectrum of Childhood Interstitial Lung Diseases: Focus on Disorders Not Specific to Infancy.
ILD.authors: Ikeda O, Tsujioka Y, Nishimura G, Yamada Y, Sugiura H, Nishi E, Shimizu K, Kono T, Jinzaki M
ILD.summary: 儿童间质性肺病影像谱多样，高分辨率CT是诊断关键，急慢性期表现不同。

ILD.title: Impact of Comorbid Interstitial Lung Abnormalities on Acute Exacerbations of COPD: A Hospital-Based Retrospective Cohort Study.
ILD.authors: Li Y, Zhou C, Yu W, Yang M, Luo J, Chen X, Liu X, Mao B, Jiang H, Liu W
ILD.summary: 合并肺间质异常不增加慢阻肺急性加重住院死亡率，但显著增加ICU入住和无创通气需求。

ILD.title: Pulmonary toxicity of immune-checkpoint inhibitors.
ILD.authors: Mahiat C, Cadranel J, Fallet V, Meteye C, Gendarme S, Slomka J, Canellas A
ILD.summary: 免疫检查点抑制剂相关肺炎虽罕见但致命，需及时识别和管理，尤其高险人群。

ILD.title: Guide from the Colegio Mexicano de Reumatologia for the Pharmacological Treatment of Systemic Sclerosis Part 1: Cutaneous Involvement, Interstitial Lung Disease, and Pulmonary Arterial Hypertension.
ILD.authors: Chacon-Abril K, Portela-Hernandez M, Fajardo-Hermosillo LD, Limon-Camacho L, Ruiz-Gomez NI, Pacheco-Tena C, Barrera-Rodriguez AA, Vera-Lastra O, Mejia M, Buedia-Roldan I, Martinez-Espinosa K, Mateos H, Mendez Flores S, Pulido-Zamudio T, Zayas-Hernandez N, Garcia-Cuellar JA, Navarro-Vergara D, Rojas-Serrano J, Medrano-Ramirez G, Rodriguez-Reyna TS
ILD.summary: 该指南为墨西哥系统性硬化症（硬皮病）的皮肤、间质性肺病及肺动脉高压提供了基于GRADE的阶梯式药物推荐。

ILD.title: Validation of screening criteria for interstitial lung disease in rheumatoid arthritis in routine clinical practice: the VAR-EPIDSER study.
ILD.authors: Mena-Vazquez N, Dominguez-Alvaro M, Bonilla Hernan MG, Atienza-Mateo B, Fernandez Velilla Pena M, Pinilla Fernandez I, Ortiz AM, Park HS, Gomez NP, Plasencia-Rodriguez C, Aguilar Hurtado MC, Holgado Perez S, Serrano-Combarro A, Vegas-Revenga N, Bernal Vidal JA, Lacasa-Molina J, Burger S, Campos Fernandez C, Fiter Areste J, Meraz Ostiz JA, Munoz Gomez MDM, Alvaredo D, Castaneda S
ILD.summary: 类风湿关节炎患者间质性肺病患病率为13%，AR-EPIDSER筛查标准有较高灵敏度但特异度较低。

ILD.title: Role of Radiographic Fibrosis Extent in Identifying Immunomodulatory Treatment Response in Hypersensitivity Pneumonitis.
ILD.authors: Muegge CN, Min B, Mrad A, Ianazzo E, Hamblin M, Pandya S, Lee G, Carroll M, Johannson KA, Matson SM
ILD.summary: 影像纤维化范围≥10%的过敏性肺炎患者对免疫调节治疗反应更差。

ILD.title: Update on diffuse idiopathic pulmonary neuroendocrine cell hyperplasia.
ILD.authors: Majumdar U, Mazzone PJ
ILD.summary: 弥漫性特发性肺神经内分泌细胞增生症易误诊为哮喘，需通过多学科协作提高诊断准确率。

ILD.title: Childhood Interstitial Lung Disease-Successful Application of a Stepwise Diagnostic Classification.
ILD.authors: Rapp CK, Griese M
ILD.summary: 该三步分类法成功应用于儿童间质性肺病，遗传诊断率达50.8%，非肺部器官受累可预测系统性疾病。

ILD.title: Evaluating the value of superoxide dismutase in anti-synthetase syndrome associated with interstitial lung disease.
ILD.authors: Luo L, Huang W, Ren F, Zhou J, Zhang Z, Ke H, Tang L
ILD.summary: 血清超氧化物歧化酶在抗合成酶综合征相关间质性肺疾病患者中显著降低，且与疾病活动性呈负相关。

ILD.title: Using Genetic Risk Scores for Rheumatoid Arthritis-Associated Interstitial Lung Disease Risk Stratification.
ILD.authors: McDermott GC, Sparks JA
ILD.summary: 摘要缺失。

ILD.title: Long-term safety and pulmonary function stabilization with nintedanib in systemic sclerosis-associated interstitial lung disease, 2020-2025: a real-world retrospective study from a reference centre.
ILD.authors: Panopoulos S, Poulia V, Vlachogiannis N, Bournia VK, Tektonidou MG, Sfikakis PP
ILD.summary: 尼达尼布在系统性硬化症相关间质性肺病中长期使用安全性良好，可稳定肺功能，腹泻是主要不良反应。

ILD.title: Lung Auscultation for Detecting Interstitial Lung Disease in Patients with Newly Diagnosed Systemic Sclerosis: Retrospective Cohort Study.
ILD.authors: Wireko FW, Tzilas V, Anim-Koranteng C, Ahmed ASS, Yeboah-Kordieh YA, Makol A, Ryu JH
ILD.summary: 系统性硬化症患者中，肺部听诊闻及湿啰音对筛查间质性肺病的敏感性较低。
